learned_metadata_bundle.namespace_policy: Treat `uogto` / `https://w3id.org/uogto/core#` as the primary core prefix and keep `uogtox` / `https://w3id.org/uogto/extensions#` as the separate extension namespace unless a compatibility track changes published IRIs.
learned_metadata_bundle.health_relevance: UOGTO supports game-theoretic modelling across genomics, clinical genetics, paediatrics, health economics, behavioural/public-health interaction models, mechanism design, and health-simulation settings.

future_enrichment.policy: Assess organisation, publication, citation, association, author, ORCID, and health-domain enrichment only when the target registry provides a defensible field and authoritative evidence.

items.latest_observation: Issue is open with no maintainer comments; cross-registry metadata supplement posted on 2026-07-07; public LOV `uogto` vocabulary API/page routes still returned 404 in the latest live check.
items.acceptance_criterion: LOV issue is accepted, rejected, or receives actionable maintainer feedback that is converted into a scoped Conductor task.
items.next_action: Monitor issue 83 after the metadata supplement; no further repo patch is required until maintainer feedback arrives.

items.latest_observation: OLS maintainer replied that they will add the ontology; cross-registry metadata supplement posted on 2026-07-07; issue remains open and public OLS API/search checks did not yet expose `uogto` as of 2026-07-06.
items.acceptance_criterion: OLS exposes UOGTO in the public index or closes the issue with a clear disposition.
items.next_action: Monitor OLS indexing after the metadata supplement; record public OLS URL once available.

items.latest_observation: Record page is live; prior public state recorded that it is awaiting FAIRsharing curator review; cross-registry metadata should be added only if curator guidance or editable schema fields support it.
items.acceptance_criterion: FAIRsharing record receives curator decision, stable public status, and any issued identifier or recommended metadata patch is recorded.
items.next_action: Monitor curator review; add organisation/publication/citation associations only when defensible.

items.latest_observation: Issue is open with no maintainer comments; cross-registry metadata supplement posted on 2026-07-07.
items.acceptance_criterion: Ontobee indexes UOGTO, rejects the request, or asks for a scoped metadata/ontology change.
items.next_action: Monitor issue 212 after the metadata supplement; record index URL if accepted.

items.namespace_decision: Defend the published two-namespace design for v1.0.0; register `uogto` as the primary core prefix and keep `uogtox` documented separately for extension modules unless Bioregistry requires a compatibility-track decision.
items.orcid_handling: ORCID https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9775-0603 is approved public project metadata and is mirrored in CITATION.cff, .zenodo.json, and the Bioregistry issue body.
items.latest_observation: UOGTO maintainer response posted on 2026-07-05 explaining the core/extension namespace split; follow-up on 2026-07-05 updated the Bioregistry issue body and comment thread with the approved sole-author/contact ORCID.
items.acceptance_criterion: Bioregistry maintainers accept the primary core prefix record, reject it, or request a squashed-namespace compatibility decision that is converted into a separate scoped Conductor track.
items.next_action: Monitor issue 1999; if Bioregistry requires one squashed namespace, open a separate ontology-compatibility track rather than editing published IRIs in this metadata response.
